message:
fix(ci): resolve CI failures in lint, GoReleaser, and tests

CI Workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml):
- Skip SBOM and signing in GoReleaser dry run since they require
  external tools (syft, cosign) not installed in CI environment
- Use --skip=publish,sbom,sign for snapshot builds

Linter Configuration (.golangci.yml):
- Disable gocritic's evalOrder checker which panics with Go 1.25
- This is a known compatibility issue between go-critic and Go 1.25

Test Fixes:
- internal/agentmail/session_test.go: Set XDG_CONFIG_HOME in addition
  to HOME for Linux compatibility (os.UserConfigDir uses XDG_CONFIG_HOME
  on Linux, not just HOME)
- internal/hooks/executor_test.go: Increase timeout from 100ms to 500ms
  for CI environments which may be slower; extend elapsed time check
  from 1s to 3s for more reliable CI execution

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -271,7 +271,8 @@ jobs:
         with:
           distribution: goreleaser
           version: "~> v2"
-          args: release --snapshot --skip=publish --clean
+          # Skip SBOM and signing in dry run (they require external tools)
+          args: release --snapshot --skip=publish,sbom,sign --clean
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

@@ -95,6 +95,7 @@ linters-settings:
       - whyNoLint
       - hugeParam  # TUI models are often passed by value
       - httpNoBody  # Using nil for empty body is fine
+      - evalOrder  # Panics with Go 1.25 (golangci-lint/go-critic compatibility issue)
 
   gofmt:
     simplify: true

@@ -53,9 +53,11 @@ func TestLoadSaveSessionAgent(t *testing.T) {
 	defer os.RemoveAll(tmpDir)
 
 	// Override the config dir for testing
-	oldHome := os.Getenv("HOME")
-	os.Setenv("HOME", tmpDir)
-	defer os.Setenv("HOME", oldHome)
+	// On Linux, os.UserConfigDir() uses XDG_CONFIG_HOME, not HOME
+	// On macOS, os.UserConfigDir() uses HOME/Library/Application Support
+	// t.Setenv handles cleanup automatically
+	t.Setenv("HOME", tmpDir)
+	t.Setenv("XDG_CONFIG_HOME", filepath.Join(tmpDir, ".config"))
 
 	sessionName := "test-session"
